name: Galaga
description:
Galaga is a fixed shooter where the player controls a single spacecraft at the bottom of the screen. The player's objective is to defend against waves of alien attackers that descend from the top of the screen. These aliens move in predetermined patterns, and periodically dive down towards the player's ship, attempting to either collide with it or fire projectiles. The aliens consist of multiple types, some more aggressive than others. Some aliens have the ability to capture the player's ship with a tractor beam. If captured, the player can rescue their ship by destroying the capturing alien. Rescuing a captured ship results in the two ships combining to form a dual fighter which has double the firepower. However, the dual fighter is also a larger target. 

The game progresses through a series of stages or waves, each presenting a different formation and attack pattern of alien forces. After several standard stages, a challenging stage appears. Once all waves in a stage are completed, the game transitions to the next stage with increasingly difficult enemy patterns and behavior. The game ends when all of the player's lives are lost.

controls.arrow_left: Move the player's ship to the left.
controls.arrow_right: Move the player's ship to the right.
controls.space: Fire projectiles from the player's ship.
